title: Vinod Pressure Cooker Stainless Steel – Outer Lid - 3 Liter – Induction Base Cooker – Indian Pressure Cooker – Sandwich Bottom – Best Used For Indian Cooking, Soups, and Rice Recipes, Quinoa
features: ✓ A STAINLESS STEEL LIKE NO OTHER: Made with 18/8 Stainless Steel representing 18% chromium and 8% nickel which makes Vinod Pressure Cooker stay resistant to corrosion and oxidation and make your steel pressure cooker hygienic and easy to clean while also being Induction Friendly making it an amazing option for cooking Indian dishes.

✓ SAY NO TO UNEVEN COOKING: With its unique bonded extra-thick 5mm aluminum core wrapped around your Outer Lid Pressure Cooker will make sure that the heat distribution to your food is even and thus enhancing the flavor and texture of your dish.

✓ A SEAL TO HELP YOUR FOOD STAY SAFE: Being sealed with food grade silicone gaskets ensures that your food does not receive any unpleasant color, smell, or taste while also helping the steel pressure cooker function efficiently in hot or cold temperatures as required.

✓ YOUR SAFETY MATTERS: It’s imperative for us to keep you safe while handling a pressure cooker which is why there is a fusible valve and a highly efficient Gasket Release System to ensure that your appliance is airtight to help the steam store in between the pan and the lid to build up pressure which ensures maximum safety.

✓ ERGONOMICALLY DESIGNED BAKELITE HANDLE: What is a pressure cooker without a good handle, the handle around your appliance is heat resistant and designed in a way to help you hold your pressure cooker without a fuss.
description: Vinod Pressure Cooker Stainless Steel – Outer Lid - 3 Liter – Induction Base Cooker – Indian Pressure Cooker – Sandwich Bottom – Best Used For Indian Cooking, Soups, and Rice Recipes, Quinoa
